questions.q: Which country has reportedly threatened to attack major U.S. tech companies like Apple, Google, and Microsoft starting April 1, 2026?
A recent report highlighted a stealthy startup that pitched 'brainless human clones' for full-body replacement as a pathway to eternal life. What is the name of this startup?
Researchers at which renowned institution recently announced advancements in improving cartilage repair through cell therapy?
According to a recent FTC report, which popular dating app was found to have shared approximately 3 million user photos with a facial recognition firm without explicit user consent?
Google recently rolled out a long-awaited feature for Gmail users. What new capability allows users to change their primary @gmail.com address without losing emails or data?
options: Changing their email address without deleting the account
Implementing end-to-end encryption for all emails
Integrating with a new social media platform
Offering unlimited cloud storage for all users
questions.correctText: Changing their email address without deleting the account
